faqs.question: What is CodLinex?
faqs.answer: CodLinex is an AI automation agency that builds custom AI agent systems for US businesses. We automate customer support, lead follow-up, scheduling, and reporting — saving clients 20+ hours per week. We also provide Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) to help businesses appear in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI answers.

faqs.question: What is an AI Agent System?
faqs.answer: An AI Agent System is a set of autonomous AI programs that operate continuously to complete business tasks without human intervention. A Manager Agent oversees the work, Worker Agents execute tasks, and a Monitor Agent checks quality — all running automatically 24/7.

faqs.question: What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?
faqs.answer: GEO is the practice of optimizing a website to appear in AI-generated answers on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini. According to Princeton University research (Aggarwal et al., KDD 2024 — doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900), GEO techniques can boost AI search visibility by up to 40%. CodLinex applies all 47 documented GEO methods.

faqs.question: How much do CodLinex AI Agent automation plans cost?
faqs.answer: These AI Agent automation plans are separate from GEO pricing (see next question). CodLinex offers three AI Agent plans: Starter at $497/month (1 AI agent, 1,000 actions), Growth at $997/month (3 AI agents, 5,000 actions — most popular), and Enterprise at $2,497/month (unlimited agents and actions). All plans include 48-hour setup and a 30-day money-back guarantee.

faqs.question: How much does CodLinex GEO (AI visibility) service cost?
faqs.answer: CodLinex offers three GEO packages, priced by your technical GEO audit score: Starter at $997/month (Good band, 68-85 score — tracking and refinement), Growth at $1,997/month (Foundation band, 36-67 — adds citation-optimized content, most popular), and Authority at $3,497/month (Critical band, 0-35 — full technical and brand-entity build). A Maintenance tier at $497/month covers tracking-only for clients who completed the full program. No long-term contracts on any tier. Get a free GEO audit score at codlinex.com/audit to see which tier fits.

faqs.question: How fast does CodLinex set up an AI system?
faqs.answer: CodLinex guarantees every AI agent system goes live within 48 hours of purchase. No technical knowledge is required from the client.

faqs.question: Which industries does CodLinex serve?
faqs.answer: CodLinex builds AI automation systems for e-commerce (Shopify, WooCommerce), healthcare clinics, real estate agencies, law firms, and marketing agencies across the United States.

faqs.question: What results do CodLinex clients achieve?
faqs.answer: CodLinex clients achieve: 91% average auto-resolution rate on customer inquiries, 73% reduction in appointment no-shows (healthcare), 23+ hours saved per week, and 340% pipeline growth (B2B SaaS). All systems go live within 48 hours.

faqs.question: CodLinex nedir?
faqs.answer: CodLinex, ABD işletmeleri için özel AI otomasyon sistemleri kuran bir yapay zeka ajansıdır. Müşteri desteği, lead takibi, randevu yönetimi ve raporlamayı otomatize ederek haftada 20+ saat tasarruf sağlarız. Ayrıca ChatGPT, Perplexity ve Google AI aramalarında görünürlük için GEO optimizasyonu yapıyoruz.

faqs.question: GEO (Generatif Arama Motoru Optimizasyonu) nedir?
faqs.answer: GEO, bir web sitesinin ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI ve Gemini gibi yapay zeka motorlarının ürettiği yanıtlarda görünmesini sağlamak için yapılan optimizasyon çalışmasıdır. Princeton Üniversitesi araştırmasına (KDD 2024, doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900) göre GEO teknikleri AI arama görünürlüğünü %40'a kadar artırabilmektedir.
